chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 1574 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 22-11-2022 Date of Decision: 22-11-2022 Muneer Ahmed, the Petitioner present in person. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. O R D E R Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner, who is serving in Pakistan Railways as Gate Man and presently posted at Railway Station, Ghotki, seeks directions to the respondents to pay his salary w.e.f. 02.11.2015 to 22.10.2016. It is case of the petitioner that he remained ill and the respondents No.3 to 5 illegally stopped his monthly salaries for the aforesaid period. In response to the petition, comments have been filed on behalf of the respondents No. 3 to 5 stating therein that the petitioner is habitual absconder from his duties. Since his appointment in 2014, he remained absent for seven times from his duty. It has further been stated that for the alleged conduct of the petitioner punishment of withholding increments for three years was inflicted upon him by the department after completing all legal and codal formalities. It is an admitted position that the petitioner has neither preferred any departmental appeal against his alleged punishment nor even he CP No.D-1574 of 2021 2 approached the NIRC; both were alternate, adequate and efficacious remedies available to the petitioner for redressal of his grievance, yet the petitioner preferred this petition on 28.10.2021 belatedly, which being devoid of any merits stands dismissed accordingly.

It is an admitted position that the petitioner has neither preferred any departmental appeal against his alleged punishment nor even he CP No.D-1574 of 2021 2 approached the NIRC; both were alternate, adequate and efficacious remedies available to the petitioner for redressal of his grievance, yet the petitioner preferred this petition on 28.10.2021 belatedly, which being devoid of any merits stands dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
